title: distribution program
manager: Make FSL visible where humans and models look — MCP registries, skills, llms.txt, machines.txt, GitHub Linguist, articles, Q&A seeds, apps — the migrated jssm#831–#869 block, run opportunistically forever and never gating engineering. This is ambient work: the llms.txt and cheat-sheet generate from the same tables as the docs, a Playwright announcer posts releases, and SEO follows the taxonomy. Distribution is a standing background program, not a milestone with an end.
cs: the migrated jssm#831-#869 block (era-tagged twins); llms.txt/cheat-sheet generated from the docs tables; the Playwright announcer (fsl#1252) posts releases; SEO per the taxonomy doc; version-agnostic, runs any time.
